ItacAcademyItem.Name: San Pietro (Accademia di)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: The academy convened in the palace of Isabella d`Este in Piazza di San Pietro in Mantua. The earliest record of the academy is a letter from Galeotto del Carretto to Isabella d`Este dated 15 April 1498. Paolo Giovio recalled visiting the academy in 1521. See Lettere inedite di Paolo Giovio tratte dall`Archivio Gonzaga di Mantova (Mantua: eredi Segna, 1885).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
